revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24122753975|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初五]][[zh:八月初五]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 5|qq=August 5}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|qid=Q329761|lt=Emperor Jomei|1=Emperor Jomei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|630|en|630|qid=Q31060|lt=630|1=630}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – {{ill|Inugami no Mitasuki|en|Inugami no Mitasuki|qid=Q11571158|lt=Inugami Onatakuwa|1=Inugami no Mitasuki}} and {{ill|Yakushi Eichi|ja|薬師恵日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushi Eichi|1=Yakushi no Enichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55407097}} were dispatched to Tang China as the 1st {{ill|Japanese missions to Tang China|en|Japanese missions to Tang China|qid=Q262529|lt=Kentōshi (envoy to Tang China)|1=Japanese missions to Tang China}}. * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}}) – The {{ill|Chōkui no Sei|ja|鐘匱の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōkui no Sei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135490496}} was established; the court set up a suggestion box to receive direct petitions from the people. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|729|en|729|qid=Q23561|lt=729|1=729}} {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}}) – The era name was changed to {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} following the presentation of a auspicious tortoise bearing the inscription “Ten'nō Kihei Chi Hyakunen.” * {{ill|Einin|ja|永祚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin|1=Einin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11132532}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1293|en|1293|qid=Q5557|lt=1293|1=1293}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}}) – Due to an extraordinary heavenly phenomenon and an earthquake in the Kantō region, the era name was changed from {{ill|Shōō (Kamakura period)|en|Shōō (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1327371|lt=Shōō (Kamakura period)|1=Shōō (Kamakura period)}} to {{ill|Einin|ja|永祚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin|1=Einin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11132532}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Kagen|en|Kagen|qid=Q1327409|lt=Kagen|1=Kagen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1303|en|1303|qid=Q5614|lt=1303|1=1303}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – Due to a comet and a drought, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kangen (Japan)|ja|乾元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangen (Japan)|1=Kangen (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10879904}} to {{ill|Kagen|en|Kagen|qid=Q1327409|lt=Kagen|1=Kagen}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1598|en|1598|qid=Q6800|lt=1598|1=1598}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}}) – At the request of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, the leaders including {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} and {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|en|Maeda Toshiie|qid=Q1196817|lt=Maeda Toshiie|1=Maeda Toshiie}} among the {{ill|Council of Five Elders|en|Council of Five Elders|qid=Q1154511|lt=Godaidō|1=Council of Five Elders}} pledged their loyalty to the {{ill|Toyotomi clan|en|Toyotomi clan|qid=Q1521658|lt=Toyotomi clan|1=Toyotomi clan}} and the {{ill|Go-Bugyō|en|Go-Bugyō|qid=Q838173|lt=Gobugyō|1=Go-Bugyō}}. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1622|en|1622|qid=Q6815|lt=1622|1=1622}} {{ill|September 10|en|September 10|qid=Q2853|lt=September 10|1=September 10}}) – During the {{ill|Great Genna Martyrdom|en|Great Genna Martyrdom|qid=Q3114717|lt=Genna Martyrs|1=Great Genna Martyrdom}}, 55 Christians were executed in Nagasaki. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – U.S. 【Consul General】 {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|タウンゼンド・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タウンゼント・ハリス|1=Townsend Harris|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q610626}} decided to establish his consulate at Shimoda, Izu, and at Tamokusen-ji. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}}) – The {{ill|Shikoku Allied Fleet Shimonoseki Bombardment Incident|ja|四国連合艦隊下関砲撃事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikoku Allied Fleet Shimonoseki Bombardment Incident|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 下関戦争|1=Shimonoseki campaign|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q891773}} occurred. == Births == * {{ill|Suigyo|ja|垂拱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suigyo|1=Chuigong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10928958}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|685|en|685|qid=Q33480|lt=685|1=685}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}}) – {{ill|Xuanzong of Tang|ja|玄宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xuanzong of Tang|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11572271}}, the 6th Emperor of Tang (died {{ill|762|en|762|qid=Q30324|lt=762|1=762}}). * {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|qid=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}}) – {{ill|Irie Nagahachi|ja|入江長八|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Irie Nagahachi|1=Chohachi Irie|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11388976}}, an artisan (died {{ill|1889|en|1889|qid=Q7831|lt=1889|1=1889}}). == Deaths == * In the 83rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|393 BC|en|393 BC|qid=Q229024|lt=393 BC|1=393 BC}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}}, the 5th Emperor of Japan. * {{ill|Jiaping|en|Jiaping|qid=Q10924007|lt=Kahira (Wei)|1=Jiaping}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|251|en|251|qid=Q30304|lt=251|1=251}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}}) – {{ill|Sima Yi|en|Sima Yi|qid=Q353698|lt=Sima Yi|1=Sima Yi}}, a statesman of the {{ill|Wei (Three Kingdoms)|ja|魏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wei (Three Kingdoms)|1=Cao Wei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124257886}} (born {{ill|179|en|179|qid=Q31352|lt=179|1=179}}). * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|737|en|737|qid=Q411351|lt=737|1=737}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Umakai|en|Fujiwara no Umakai|qid=Q1370638|lt=Fujiwara Urai|1=Fujiwara no Umakai}}, a kugyō (noble) (born {{ill|694|en|694|qid=Q23483|lt=694|1=694}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1585|en|1585|qid=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – {{ill|Itō Yoshisuke|en|Itō Yoshisuke|qid=Q6095349|lt=Itō Yoshisuke|1=Itō Yoshisuke}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (born {{ill|1512|en|1512|qid=Q6192|lt=1512|1=1512}}). * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|qid=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku|1=Bunroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1593|en|1593|qid=Q6772|lt=1593|1=1593}} {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}}) – {{ill|Imai Sōkyū|en|Imai Sōkyū|qid=Q6002963|lt=Imai Muneyuki|1=Imai Sōkyū}}, a merchant (born {{ill|1520|en|1520|qid=Q6284|lt=1520|1=1520}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|4|8|6|7|5|9|8|0805|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:8 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:August 5 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 8월 5일]] [[ja:8月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月初五]]
[[ar:August 5 (Lunisolar)]]
